name: Friendship Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Friendship starter, dry milk powder, flour, sugar, brown sugar, and butter in a covered bowl until combined.
2. Let the mixture set in a warm place for several hours or overnight.
3. Add 1 egg beaten well to the mixture and mix in salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, cloves, and baking soda until just combined.
4. Optionally add half a cup of chopped nuts and/or raisins if desired.
5. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan and bake at 350°F for 35-45 minutes.
6. Test for doneness by inserting a toothpick into the center; it should come out clean when the cake is done.
7. Allow the cake to cool in the pan before removing it.
WARNING: REALLY GOOD and needs no frosting.
